content.full_text:
Assembly California Legislature

PAT NOLAN
ASSEMBLYMAN, FORTY-FIRST DISTRICT

September 10, 1990

John Wallace
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear John,

Thanks for your help on our town hall meeting piece. This letter is meant to confirm our phone conversation.

As we discussed this afternoon, the Glendale Senior's Center has requested permission to place an ad in the local paper publicizing the meeting. The cost of the ad will be paid for by the Senior's Center. There will be no cost at all to the taxpayers. You told me this was acceptable under the law.

Once again, thanks for your help.

Sincerely,

Grant D. Gillham
Associate Consultant
